sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92478" key="r(inhla/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥῑνηλ-άτης</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype></foreign>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n92478.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who tracks by scent</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κύων ῥ</foreign>. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:74" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.74</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
